name: TORQ Inc.
summary: TORQ Inc. engages in the import, export, and sale of rivets and fastening products in Japan. It offers a range of screw products, including small screws and high-tension bolts, inserts, spacers, PC nuts, coupler washers, flange hardware, connecting plates, and lifting jigs, as well as hardware for manholes; construction and civil engineering, and building related products, such as material handling and transportation, civil engineering and construction, and hydraulic equipment, as well as welding/fusing instruments, work/measuring tools, safety and disaster prevention goods, air electric tools, electric installation, plumbing fixtures, and cutting and grinding tools; machine and industrial screws, and fasteners; and stainless steel and special steel products, such as brass, copper, titanium, and hastelloy. The company was formerly known as Kobayashi Metals Limited and changed its name to TORQ Inc. in April 2020. TORQ Inc. was founded in 1926 and is based in Osaka, Japan.
